notes: All 3 slices implemented. Typecheck passes (pre-existing errors only from unrelated files). New components follow established patterns: dialog-manage-agents uses List with groups (like dialog-manage-models), dialog-edit-agent uses form pattern (like dialog-edit-project), settings-agents uses gradient header pattern (like settings-providers). IPC layer uses dedicated handlers for custom agents CRUD via electron-store. Context display enhancement adds color-coded usage warnings and compaction detection from message parts.
